creator: ihor@antonovs.family
text:
I encountered the same problem on Framework 16 laptop.

Half a year ago I installed 15-Current snapshot and it worked fine (it had other issues but bootloader was fast)

Today I installed latest snapshot (20250522). The text got bigger and bootloader is very slow. It takes several seconds to print a single line of text. 
Once kernel boots things go fast again. 

I am happy to test patches or settings!
